news.headline: Duke Energy expands program in NC to help businesses access renewable energy; approval for Green Source Advantage Choice.
news.summary: Duke Energy in Charlotte, N.C., announced on October 22, 2024, the approval of Green Source Advantage Choice (GSA-C) in North Carolina. This program enables large businesses to access renewable energy on Duke Energy's grid. Through GSA-C, businesses can benefit from added options to support renewable energy initiatives. Duke Energy, listed as DUK on the NYSE, has introduced this program to provide opportunities for companies to utilize sustainable energy sources. This initiative aims to further integrate renewable energy into the grid and foster environmental sustainability.

news.headline: Notable AI platform honors 2024 Impact Award winners for excellence in healthcare with dedication to transformation.
news.summary: Today, in San Mateo, California, Notable, the established AI platform for enhancing healthcare, unveiled the winners of the 2024 Notable Impact awards. These awards honor healthcare organizations and individuals who have exhibited outstanding leadership and dedication to revolutionizing healthcare practices.

news.headline: EQT chair ranks geopolitical risk as top concern, not rising rates.
EQT Chairman Jonsson expressed concern over geopolitical risk as top priority for the company.
CED releases Solutions Brief on strengthening US infrastructure & manufacturing. $1 billion investment, 3-year plan outlined.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, the Committee for Economic Development (CED) released a Solutions Brief titled "Strategic Investment in Infrastructure: Priorities for Implementation." This report provides a three-year update on the implementation of a $1 billion investment in infrastructure. The CED, the public policy arm of The Conference Board, aims to address key issues related to infrastructure development and offers insights into the progress made in this crucial sector. Through this brief, stakeholders and policymakers can gain valuable information on the current status of infrastructure investment and the priorities that need to be focused on in the coming years.

news.headline: Fontainebleau Las Vegas to showcase Aston Martin cars from Nov 1-22, ahead of Race Week return on the Strip.
news.summary: A renowned British automaker will be featuring their upcoming lineup of sports cars and iconic vintage models at the prestigious luxury resort and casino in Las Vegas. This presentation will take place just before the much-anticipated Race Week on the Strip event. The event is set to occur on October 22, 2024. Fontainebleau Las Vegas, the latest addition to the Strip's opulent accommodations, will host the exclusive showcase.

news.headline: Targus introduces 16" Transit 4-Wheel Rolling Laptop Case for commuters, featuring protective sleeve and smooth rolling system.
news.summary: Targus® has unveiled a state-of-the-art rolling laptop case in Anaheim, California on October 22, 2024. This innovative case is set to revolutionize the daily commute for professionals and students who are burdened with heavy workloads. Boasting a roomy interior and a featherweight design, it comes equipped with a protective laptop sleeve and a four-wheel rolling system for seamless mobility. Targus®, a leading brand in the industry, has provided yet another game-changing product that is sure to make waves.

news.headline: In Nevada, Trump leads Harris by 1 point overall and by 7 points among voters 50-plus, according to AARP poll.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by AARP Nevada for the 2024 statewide election, it was revealed that Former President Donald Trump is leading Vice President Kamala Harris by 1 point among all voters. Specifically among voters aged 50 and above, Trump holds a significant 7-point lead over Harris. The results highlight the close competition between the two candidates, with Trump's lead being more pronounced in the older demographic. This data provides insights into the preferences of voters in Nevada leading up to the election.

news.headline: Halifax Group promotes Davis Hostetter to Managing Director, Will Morrissett joins as Vice President. Washington, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: Halifax Group ("Halifax"), a middle market private equity firm, has appointed Will Morrissett as Vice President in addition to promoting Davis Hostetter to Managing. The announcement was made on October 22, 2024. Halifax works with management to invest in top-performing companies. This move signifies growth and enhanced leadership within the company, further solidifying their position in the market. These updates reflect Halifax's commitment to expanding its team to drive success.

news.headline: Constellium (NYSE:CSTM) to release quarterly earnings on 2024-10-23. Analysts expect EPS of $0.50. Investors anticipate positive results.
news.summary: Constellium (NYSE:CSTM) is gearing up to announce their quarterly earnings on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts project an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.50. Investors are eagerly awaiting the update, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Opportunity Finance Network & MassMutual Foundation partner with $25M to scale CDFI Industry for future growth.
news.summary: In an effort to revolutionize the community development finance sector, there is a groundbreaking partnership in Los Angeles as of October 22, 2024. Opportunity Finance Network, the primary network and intermediary in the U.S., is spearheading this initiative. Their goal is to foster innovation, establish scalable infrastructure, and fundamentally reshape the industry. This revolutionary collaboration is poised to bring significant changes, marking a new era in community finance.

news.headline: LBB Specialties partners with Myzel Organics to distribute functional mushroom powders in N. America (Oct. 22, 2024).
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - On October 22, 2024, LBB Specialties (LBBS), a prominent distributor of specialty chemicals and ingredients across North America, has revealed a recent collaboration with Myzel Organics. This new distribution partnership involves Myzel Organics, a top-tier supplier of 100% organic functional mushroom powders.

news.headline: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY) to report an EPS of $4.97 on 2024-10-23. Past performance saw beats in EPS with modest stock price fluctuations. Shares currently trading at $446.93, up 19.21% in the last year. Analysts rate TDY as Buy.
news.summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) is set to announce its quarterly earnings, with analysts anticipating an earnings per share (EPS) of $4.97. In the previous quarter, the company surpassed earnings estimates by $0.09, resulting in a slight drop in share price. The current stock price stands at $446.93, showing a 19.21% increase over the past year. Analysts rate Teledyne Technologies as a Buy, with limited ratings available. Investors are eager for positive guidance from the company's upcoming announcement, aware that future projections heavily impact stock prices beyond historical performance. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com for further details.

news.headline: Knowesis earns 2024 Great Place to Work Certification™ in Fairfax, VA - 4th consecutive year. 92% employee satisfaction.
news.summary: In Fairfax, Virginia, on October 22, 2024, Knowesis, Inc. announced their fourth consecutive certification as a Great Place To Work®. This recognition is determined by employee feedback, with this year's survey showing a notable 92% satisfaction rate among current employees. This achievement underscores Knowesis' commitment to creating a positive work environment.

news.headline: CLO Virtual Fashion launches CLO Academy: an official online hub for digital fashion design training.
news.summary: In New York on October 22, 2024, CLO Virtual Fashion Inc., a top player in fashion technology, revealed the debut of CLO Academy, their official online educational platform. This initiative aims to help students properly learn CLO software. CLO Academy offers a comprehensive learning experience designed for mastering the software efficiently.

news.headline: CACI International (NYSE:CACI) to release earnings of $5.06/share on 2024-10-23. Past EPS beat by $0.68, leading to 3.05% share increase. Shares at $532.16, up 64.36% in 52 weeks. 6 analysts rate as Buy with an average price target. Market bullish on upcoming earnings.
news.summary: CACI International (NYSE:CACI) is set to report its quarterly earnings with an expected EPS of $5.06. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement for potential surpassing of estimates and positive guidance for the future. The company's past performance shows beating the EPS estimate in the last quarter by $0.68, resulting in a 3.05% increase in share price the following day. In the last quarter, EPS estimates and actuals have been as follows - Q4 2024: 5.93 and 6.61, Q3 2024: 5.63 and 5.74, Q2 2024: 4.47 and 4.36, and Q1 2024: 4.55 and 4.36 respectively. The shares were trading at $532.16 on October 21 with a 52-week increase of 64.36%. Analyst opinions are mostly bullish with a consensus Buy rating and an average one-year price target pending. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Upcoming auction at Infinity Festival will feature over 200 Star Trek items on November 9th at The Aster in Los Angeles.
news.summary: In Hollywood, California on October 22, 2024, Julien's Auctions and Infinity Festival have joined forces to introduce "Bid Long and Prosper," a special event showcasing more than 200 unique Star Trek collectibles. This exclusive exhibition and auction is set to be held on November 9th at The Aster venue in Los Angeles.

news.headline: ECB's Rehn: Growth outlook has weakened and this could increase disinflationary pressures.
Real Estate company Real launches Real Wallet for agents, integrating earnings, revenue share, and equity in one platform.
news.summary: Real, a well-known brokerage firm, has recently introduced Real Wallet, a cutting-edge financial platform designed for agents. This innovative tool seamlessly integrates earnings, revenue share, and equity into a single user-friendly platform. Real Wallet aims to streamline financial processes and provide agents with a more efficient and convenient way to manage their finances. This platform is expected to revolutionize the way agents track and access their earnings.

news.headline: UiPath integrates Anthropic's large language model Claude 3.5 Sonnet to enhance three key products.
news.summary: UiPath, a company based in New York and Las Vegas, has recently revealed the incorporation of Anthropic's large language model (LLM), Claude 3.5 Sonnet, into their systems. This integration aims to introduce advanced AI capabilities across three primary products offered by UiPath.

news.headline: ecobee integrates smart locks from Yale, August for smarter security. Allows control from ecobee account, US and Canada customers benefit.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, ecobee has introduced a new feature that enhances home security, providing customers with a more intelligent living space. By integrating with renowned smart lock brands such as Yale and August, ecobee Smart Security users in the United States and Canada can now seamlessly connect Wi-Fi-enabled smart locks to their ecobee account. This new capability eliminates the need to fret over forgetting to lock the door, allowing customers to remotely lock and unlock their front door from anywhere. Moreover, users can conveniently control their smart lock directly from the Live View feature of their ecobee app. This initiative aims to simplify home security measures and ensure peace of mind for homeowners.

news.headline: MultiPlan appoints Tiffani Misencik as Chief Growth Officer to drive strategic growth, supporting the company's next phase.
news.summary: In New York, MultiPlan Corporation, a key player in data-driven cost management solutions for the U.S. healthcare industry, has welcomed Tiffani Misencik as the new Chief Growth Officer. This strategic move aims to bolster the company's growth phase, with Misencik taking the lead in driving expansion. MultiPlan, listed on NYSE as MPLN, emphasizes transparency, fairness, quality, and affordability in its services. The appointment highlights MultiPlan's commitment to advancing its leadership team for future success.

news.headline: ECB's Rehn: Euro-area disinflation is well on track.
ECB's Rehn: Weaker growth could increase disinflationary pressures.
ECB's Rehn: Growth is expected to remain sluggish.
ECB's Rehn: Rate cuts are coming, the speed and scope is to be decided later.
ECB's Rehn: A soft landing seems plausible for the Euro Area.
Activist investor Starboard criticizes Pfizer for underperforming R&D, overpaying for acquisitions; Pfizer has seen a 50% stock drop since 2021.
news.summary: Starboard Value, an activist investor, has heightened its criticism of Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) by holding the pharmaceutical giant's management responsible for failing to fulfill their promises of innovation and growth. Despite owning a small stake in Pfizer, Starboard's disapproval mirrors the widespread discontent among investors regarding the company's stock performance, which has plummeted by approximately 50% since 2021. Criticisms were voiced during the Active-Passive Investor Summit, where Starboard asserted that Pfizer, helmed by CEO Albert Bourla, has not maximized on the post-COVID-19 momentum, resulting in notable underperformance in research and development, as well as mergers and acquisitions.In a presentation disclosed on Tuesday, Starboard highlighted Pfizer's staggering $20 billion decrease in market value since 2019, despite a $40 billion surge from its COVID-19 portfolio. The activist investor expressed worries over Pfizer's extensive debt levels hindering its potential for growth.

news.headline: US, EU to finalize $50B Ukraine loan backed by Russian assets, Treasury Secretary close to agreement. Yellen criticizes China's lending, urges debt relief.
news.summary: The Treasury Secretary, Janet L. Yellen, indicated that a deal is imminent. In addition, she criticized China's borrowing methods and advocated for increased assistance with debt, highlighting the need for further action in these areas.

news.headline: Global Health Exhibition in Riyadh features innovative technologies from world class exhibitors, highlighting AI-enabled diagnostic solutions revolutionizing patient care.
news.summary: Top exhibitors from around the globe present innovative digital and practical health technologies, highlighting the potential for revolutionizing patient care in the coming decade. The event attracts a large audience keen on learning about AI-powered diagnostic tools designed to accelerate disease detection and enhance treatment processes. This demonstrates the industry's commitment to embracing cutting-edge solutions in healthcare, as the attendees witness firsthand the impact of these frontier-pushing technologies.

news.headline: BitMEX introduces SCRUSDT perpetual swap, offering 50x leverage on Scroll's token. Explore the enhanced trading options.
news.summary: BitMEX has introduced a SCRUSDT perpetual swap, enabling traders to utilize leverage of up to 50x on SCR, the digital token of Scroll. This move opens up fresh trading prospects for investors looking to capitalize on the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: BitFuFu set to enhance Bitcoin mining operations with new facility in Ethiopia, marking its physical debut in operations.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has reached 6.2%, with 9.8 million individuals currently out of work. Additionally, the inflation rate has risen by 2.5% over the last quarter. The stock market also experienced a decline, with the main index dropping by 3.7%. Experts are attributing these changes to ongoing economic challenges and uncertainties in the global market. The government is considering implementing new policies to address these issues and stimulate economic growth. Overall, the current economic landscape presents both challenges and opportunities for policymakers and businesses alike.

news.headline: Discover how agentic AI revolutionizes industries with advanced problem-solving and planning, evolving AI with reasoning.
news.summary: Discover how revolutionary artificial intelligence (AI) technology is reshaping various sectors by independently tackling intricate, multi-step issues through advanced logic and iterative strategizing. This innovative approach is redefining industries by achieving unprecedented efficiency and problem-solving capabilities.

news.headline: Disney's CEO Iger sets Happily Ever After on track, sources report.
Raydium outperforms Ethereum in fee revenue, with $3.4M on Oct. 21 compared to Ethereum's $3.35M, per DeFiLlama.
news.summary: On October 21, Raydium, a platform based on Solana, generated $3.4 million in fee revenue, surpassing Ethereum's $3.35 million. This data was reported by DeFiLlama, highlighting the increasing popularity and success of Solana-based projects in the decentralized finance sector.

news.headline: SEC alleges 4 firms played down SolarWinds hacks.
Institut Curie boosts efficiency with Microsoft's Copilot AI tool, freeing up time for cancer research. #Innovative #AI #Research
news.summary: Institut Curie has implemented Microsoft's Copilot, an AI tool, to enhance efficiency in administrative duties, freeing up valuable time for researchers to concentrate on pioneering cancer research work. This adoption aims to optimize operations at the institute.

news.headline: New: Claude AI now controls mouse & keyboard through Anthropic beta. Company admits it's error-prone but seeks feedback for faster progress.
news.summary: The company describes the feature as "still in the experimental stage, occasionally difficult to use and prone to errors," but is optimistic that input from developers will enhance its progress.

news.headline: Legal technology company Dye & Durham reportedly considering a sale after receiving takeover offers.
Official from European Central Bank suggests being flexible with interest rates to stay up-to-date with economic trends.

GE Aerospace's Q3 results show 6% Y/Y revenue growth to $8.943B, with $9.84B GAAP revenue. Adjusted EPS now $4.20-$4.35, higher than consensus. Adjusted operating profit projected at $6.7B-$6.9B. Analysts see different stories in the segments.
news.summary: In relation to the third-quarter 2024 results of GE Aerospace's (NYSE:GE), Goldman Sachs analyst Noah Poponak shared their analysis. The company showcased adjusted revenue growth of 6% year over year, bringing in $8.943 billion, while their GAAP revenue amounted to $9.84 billion. Surpassing the analyst consensus of $9.022 billion, GE remains optimistic about achieving high single-digit adjusted revenue growth. The updated guidance now sets the adjusted EPS at $4.20-$4.35, compared to the previous range of $3.95-$4.20, slightly lower than the $4.25 consensus. Furthermore, GE anticipates adjusted operating profit to fall between $6.7 billion and $6.9 billion, up from the initial estimate of $6.5 billion to $6.8 billion. The detailed report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: New short film "THE TRIAL" by director Gandja Monteiro, in partnership with All* In Action Fund, highlights dangers of abortion bans. It draws parallels between 17th-century witch trials and today's political climate. Release comes before U.S. Presidential election.
news.summary: In Washington, the All* In Action Fund has partnered with director Gandja Monteiro on the film THE TRIAL, addressing the growing battle for reproductive freedoms in the US. The film draws parallels between 17th-century witch trials and current issues, highlighting the risks women face due to abortion bans. Released shortly before the US Presidential election, THE TRIAL aims to raise awareness on the urgent need to protect women's access to care. Monteiro, known for works like WEDNESDAY, AGATHA ALL ALONG, and BRAND NEW CHERRY FLAVOR, adds a provocative touch to this crucial conversation.

news.headline: ConceiveAbilities introduces enhanced surrogacy program for intended parents & surrogates, providing top support.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 22, 2024, ConceiveAbilities, the top surrogacy and egg donation agency in the country, revealed the introduction of its upgraded All-In Program. This program provides intended parents and surrogates with exceptional support, security, and care during their surrogacy journey. This initiative aims to offer a comprehensive service to individuals involved in surrogacy and has been met with enthusiasm from both parties.

news.headline: SOL leads with 10y at 4.2%, BTC at 67k (-2%), ETH at 2620 (-4%), and APT, UNI, HNT, POPCAT, RUNE, KAS as top gainers. PumpFun sold $78m SOL fees, with Raydium surpassing ETH fees. Scroll disappoints at $1.2bn FDV. Crypto significantly used for drug deals per Fed’s Kashkari. VanEck adds SOL staking to ETPs in Europe. LINK announces SWIFT trial success. Brevan Howard trades crypto in UAE. Japan eyes crypto tax cuts, XRP founder donates $10m to Kamala, CFTC chair notes constraints on regulating crypto. Transak exposed 92k customer data, Sky considers MakerDAO rebrand.
news.summary: Bitcoin has dropped by 2% to $67,000, Ethereum is down 4% at $2,620, while Solana remains steady at $166. Top gainers in the market include APT, UNI, HNT, POPCAT, RUNE, and KAS. Solana continues to outperform with PumpFun selling $78 million of SOL fees. Raydium has surpassed ETH in 24-hour fees. Scroll disappoints after launching with a $1.2 billion fully diluted valuation. Federal Reserve's Kashkari suggests that cryptocurrency is primarily used for illicit activities like drug deals. VanEck introduces staking to Solana exchange-traded products in Europe. LINK reports success from a trial with SWIFT. Brevan Howard conducts most of its crypto trades from the UAE. Japanese political parties are seeking tax cuts for cryptocurrencies. XRP co-founder donates $10 million to Kamala Harris. CFTC chair expresses limitations in regulating crypto. Transak exposes data of 92,000 customers. MakerDAO may rebrand to Sky.

news.headline: ETF outperforms S&P 500 with AI investments in an unexpected sector.
Naomi Watts named first brand ambassador for Coyuchi, showcasing conscious luxury with natural beauty.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed to celebrate natural beauty and mindful luxury, highlighting the idea that the most beautiful things in life are often the most organic. The collaboration, which was announced in San Francisco on October 22, 2024, involves Coyuchi, a company known for creating premium organic home products that prioritize conscious luxury. This collaboration aims to combine efforts in promoting effortless beauty and sustainable living.

Blinken and Netanyahu see death of Sinwar as opening new possibilities for the future.
Local chiropractor, Dr. Capers Zentmeyer (31), to race at Virginia is for Racing Lovers 300 at Martinsville Speedway on Oct 26.
news.summary: In Collinsville, Virginia, on October 22, 2024, Dr. Capers Zentmeyer, a 31-year-old chiropractor from Martinsville, will showcase his talents at the upcoming Virginia is for Racing Lovers 300 event at Martinsville Speedway on October 26th. This highly anticipated race will be a significant opportunity for Zentmeyer to shine in his hometown.

news.headline: NCL introduces new gaming zones and spa amenities on Norwegian Aqua and Luna cruise ships.
news.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCL) will be introducing a new Aqua and Luna Game Zone experience on their two ships, along with returning expanded attractions. In addition, both ships will feature upgraded spa services including a new clay sauna and IV drip therapy. The unveiling of these enhancements is scheduled for October 22, 2024, in Miami.
